title: Forever feat, Xzibit
lyrics: I ain't gonna live forever I'm trying to live forever I ain't gonna live forever I ain't gonna live forever Forever, forever, forever, forever I ain't trying to live forever Forever, forever, forever, forever, forever Creativity to teach you Live forever, forever in you M-S-Q-T-X Forever, forever in you All praise is due to the Most High And everything preceded by my third eye I was raised a Jehovah's Witness Found quickly nothing was in it Fuck that organized religion, I'm a soldier with a vision Addiction was not an option Give me a fighting chance, I'll fight any nigga and drop him Yeah, I see motherfuckers get mutilated Separated, disintegrated, I barely made it Yeah, you motherfuckers don't want none Gatlin, I named my own son after a huge gun Yeah, that means I'm really with the bullshit And I don't waste no time, my time is precious in the pulpit So live forever Are you gonna live forever? Forever, forever, forever, forever Are you gonna be forever? Forever, forever, forever, forever Sing the songs, sing the music of our times Live forever, forever, forever, forever Are you gonna go down that line Live forever, forever, forever, forever Come on, one more time Forever, forever, forever, forever Yeah, the X-Man with a ex-wife So many demons you would think I was the Antichrist Yeah, talkin' down on your websites Bitch, I ain't on the web, I'm in real life Yeah, sock a nigga in his forehead Put somethin' on his mind, cross the line, nigga, go ahead And that shit don't make me tough, I'm tough Cause I chose to live after decades of fuckin' up The D.O.C., my favorite rapper Is there really an afterlife? And if so, can I smoke a backwood? Yeah, I gave my life to artistic endeavors And took the measure to assure I would be here forever Are you gonna live forever? Forever, forever, forever, forever Are you gonna sing your song? Forever, forever, forever, forever, forever Put your lives down in the pavement Put your stance on the wall Tell us your feelings about you And stand for somethin' now Through song and music you can uplift your people Stand tall on your own Through these rhymes and through these songs We're gonna live forever I come around to live forever Forever, forever, forever, forever Are you gonna sing with us and live forever? Forever, forever, forever, forever, forever And you Do-do-do-do-do-do X to the Z and a scribe to V

lyricsSegments.text: I ain't gonna live forever
I'm trying to live forever
I ain't gonna live forever
I ain't gonna live forever
Forever, forever, forever, forever
I ain't trying to live forever
Forever, forever, forever, forever, forever
Creativity to teach you
Live forever, forever in you
M-S-Q-T-X
Forever, forever in you
All praise is due to the Most High
And everything preceded by my third eye
I was raised a Jehovah's Witness
Found quickly nothing was in it
Fuck that organized religion, I'm a soldier with a vision
Addiction was not an option
Give me a fighting chance, I'll fight any nigga and drop him
Yeah, I see motherfuckers get mutilated
Separated, disintegrated, I barely made it
Yeah, you motherfuckers don't want none
Gatlin, I named my own son after a huge gun
Yeah, that means I'm really with the bullshit
And I don't waste no time, my time is precious in the pulpit
So live forever
Are you gonna live forever?
Forever, forever, forever, forever
Are you gonna be forever?
Forever, forever, forever, forever
Sing the songs, sing the music of our times
Live forever, forever, forever, forever

Live forever, forever, forever, forever
Come on, one more time
Forever, forever, forever, forever
Yeah, the X-Man with a ex-wife
So many demons you would think I was the Antichrist
Yeah, talkin' down on your websites
Bitch, I ain't on the web, I'm in real life
Yeah, sock a nigga in his forehead
Put somethin' on his mind, cross the line, nigga, go ahead
And that shit don't make me tough, I'm tough
Cause I chose to live after decades of fuckin' up
The D.O.C., my favorite rapper
Is there really an afterlife?
And if so, can I smoke a backwood?
Yeah, I gave my life to artistic endeavors
And took the measure to assure I would be here forever
Are you gonna live forever?
Forever, forever, forever, forever
Are you gonna sing your song?
Forever, forever, forever, forever, forever
Put your lives down in the pavement
Put your stance on the wall
Tell us your feelings about you
And stand for somethin' now
Through song and music you can uplift your people

Through these rhymes and through these songs
We're gonna live forever

Forever, forever, forever, forever

Forever, forever, forever, forever, forever
And you
Do-do-do-do-do-do
X to the Z and a scribe to V
